configurePresets.name: gfortran-base
configurePresets.description: Shared settings for the gfortran (h5fc) builds. Each preset gets its own build tree under build/<preset-name>, and installs to a throwaway prefix inside that tree -- so a preset NEVER overwrites the production install in $IMAGO_DIR/bin or the hand-driven build/release and build/debug trees.

configurePresets.name: gfortran-release
configurePresets.description: Optimized production-style build (-O3). Same flags as the default RELEASE build; useful for a clean reference binary.

configurePresets.name: gfortran-debug
configurePresets.description: The long-standing debug build: -Og -g -fcheck=all -fbacktrace. No extra opt-in instrumentation.

configurePresets.name: gfortran-audit
configurePresets.displayName: gfortran: audit (checks + FP traps + SNaN + warnings)
configurePresets.description: Debug plus the static/runtime bug-hunting set: runtime checks, floating-point exception traps, signaling-NaN initialization, and the extra warning set. For the bug-squashing campaign (dev/DEBUG.md).

configurePresets.name: gfortran-asan
configurePresets.description: Debug plus AddressSanitizer (which includes LeakSanitizer at exit on Linux) and runtime checks. For runtime memory-error and leak hunting (dev/DEBUG.md Phase 3).
